title: Raid above Corellia
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the raid in 1 BBY|[[Battle of Corellia (disambiguation)|other battles]]}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle at Atzerri]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' |conc= |next=[[Scanning in the Vergesso Asteroids]] |image=[[File:Mission_von_Corellia.jpg]] |name=Raid above Corellia |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] ([[Operation Skyhook]]) |date=c. [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]{{EaW_1BBY}} |place=[[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] |result=Rescue of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] |side1=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |side2=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]] |commanders2=[[Fleet Commander/Legends|Fleet Commander]] |commanders3=[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] *[[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] *[[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] **[[Sundered Heart/Legends|''Sundered Heart'']] *[[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]] *[[Assault Frigate Mark II/Legends|Assault Frigate Mark IIs]] |forces2=3 [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] *1 [[Cardan V-class space station|''Cardan V''-class space station]] |forces3=*1 [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] **[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] |forces4= |casual1=Moderate |casual2=Light |casual3=None |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Well, well, if it isn't the Rebel Alliance! Seeing as how you're all about helping people, how about lending me a hand? I've got some unwanted Imperial attention...|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|}} The '''Raid above Corellia''' was a minor skirmish during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was rescued by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] over [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. ==Prelude== {{Quote|The captured pirate has divulged information he's gathered on this superweapon project. We know where Tarkin was conducting research, but we risk a frontal assault on a fortified Imperial station.|[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]|}} After having [[Battle at Atzerri|captured]] a pirate informer over [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] had learnt that [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] was personally overseeing the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Death Star/Legends|superweapon project]] from a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] orbiting [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]]. But before attacking the station, the Rebels needed to find a way to disable the defenses of the station. After hearing of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] success at [[Prison Break on Kashyyyk|rescuing]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and a number of [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] earlier on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] strived to contact him to help the Rebellion's investigations. They eventually found him caught in a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer's]] tractor beam over [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. ==The raid== {{Quote|We will consider it payment for future services rendered.''"
"''Payment? Well, I… okay, okay! Fine! Deal! Just get us out of here!|Mon Mothma and Han Solo|}} [[File:Rescue_the_Millennium_Falcon.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] attacking the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]]] The rebels sent a small fleet in the system to rescue him. While the Rebel fleet attacked the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]], the [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] moved in to disable the [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] of the command Star Destroyer. They eventually managed to destroy it before it could reach the [[Cardan-class space station|''Cardan''-class space station]]. The [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] escaped and [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspaced]] out of the system. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|We have a mission for you, Captain Solo. Something that I feel is perfectly suited for someone with your particular... skills. We have an errand for you to run to Vergesso.|Mon Mothma to Han Solo|}} Mon Mothma later personally recruited [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], despite Solo's reluctance, to assist the Rebels in the [[Raid over Corulag|raid]] on the Imperial research facility over Corulag. Solo was hired to [[Scanning in the Vergesso Asteroids|plant]] a tracking device and [[Electromagnetic pulse/Legends|EMP]] in one of the cargo containers bound for the research station. ==Behind the scenes== This battle was the seventh mission of the Rebel campaign in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War'': Prima Official Game Guide]] {{1stm}} *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Skyhook}} {{Interlang |de=Mission von Corellia |es=Incursión sobre Corellia }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Corellia, Raid above}} [[Category:Battles of Corellia]] [[Category:Battles of Operation Skyhook]]
